Taylor Kim
Detroit, MI

JUNIOR FRONT-END DEVELOPER
Lakeview Digital Studio | 2024-2026

- Built responsive marketing sites and landing pages for small-business clients
  using semantic HTML, modern CSS, and JavaScript.
- Translated Figma mockups and written acceptance criteria into reusable page
  sections that worked across desktop and mobile layouts.
- Developed React components for forms, navigation, testimonials, service
  listings, and lead-generation pages.
- Diagnosed layout, validation, and interaction bugs reported by clients and
  project managers.
- Tested releases in Chrome, Safari, Firefox, iOS, and Android viewport sizes
  before publishing changes.
- Used Git branches and pull requests to collaborate with two developers and
  incorporate code-review feedback.
- Improved keyboard navigation, form labels, heading structure, and color
  contrast during accessibility reviews.
- Reduced image payloads and unnecessary scripts to improve Core Web Vitals on
  several client sites.
- Updated metadata, semantic page structure, redirects, and internal links for
  basic search optimization.
- Explained implementation options and delivery risks during weekly meetings
  with designers, account managers, and clients.

WEB DEVELOPMENT INTERN
North Loop Community Media | 2023-2024

- Updated content, page layouts, and site navigation in an existing JavaScript
  and CSS codebase.
- Fixed responsive styling defects and cross-browser inconsistencies under the
  guidance of a senior developer.
- Documented completed changes and unresolved questions in project tickets.

EDUCATION

Associate of Applied Science in Web Development
